Caption-Generator.description: A deep learning image captioning application using CNN-LSTM architecture, featuring a Django/DRF backend and a React/Vite frontend.

Email_Verifier.description: A Django-based email verification engine featuring a 6-layer validation pipeline with Celery and Redis for async bulk email verification.

Faq_RAG_Chatbot.description: An AI chatbot application leveraging Django Channels and Daphne for real-time WebSocket communication, integrated with the Google Gemini API for intelligent conversational FAQ answering.

Healthcare-Portal.description: A health administration dashboard containing telemetry check schedules, doctor catalogs, patient diagnostic logs, and dynamic crispy forms.
